SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.util

クラス MapSupport

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
public final class MapSupport extends Object
Static helpers for Map work: null-safe emptiness checks, default substitution, and typed reads with fallbacks. Use this class for configuration maps, loosely typed JSON-style objects, and other Map<?, ?> sources where repeating null and containsKey guards is noisy.

Null handling

Unless stated otherwise, a null map reference is treated as "missing":
  • Predicates such as isEmpty(Map) treat null like an empty map.
  • Accessor methods return the supplied default when the map is null, the key is not contained, parsing fails, or (for some methods) the stored value is null; see each method for exact rules.
This matches CollectionSupport and StringSupport conventions (and differs from calling Map instance methods on null, which would throw NullPointerException).

Absent keys vs null values

Accessors use Map.containsKey(Object) before reading values. A missing key and a key mapped to null can therefore behave differently depending on the method: for example, getString(Map, Object, String) uses ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) on the stored value, so an explicit null value yields the string default, whereas getBoolean(Map, Object, boolean) treats a null value like "no usable boolean" and returns the boolean default. Refer to each method when the distinction matters.

Typed getters

getInt(Map, Object, int) and getLong(Map, Object, long) accept Number instances in the map (using Number.intValue() / Number.longValue()). For other types the value is converted with ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) and parsed via NumberSupport.toInt(String, int) / NumberSupport.toLong(String, long) (trimming and NumberFormatException handling per those methods).

Boolean interpretation

getBoolean(Map, Object, boolean) unwraps Boolean directly. Other types are converted to a string and parsed with Boolean.parseBoolean(String) only (typically only the literal "true", ignoring case, is true). Values such as "yes" or "1" are not treated as true; interpret those strings at the call site if your configuration uses alternate spellings.

Exceptions

These helpers do not throw for ordinary null maps, missing keys, or failed parsing of string values: they return defaults as documented. defaultIfNull(Map, Map) delegates to ObjectSupport.requireNonNullElse(Object, Object) and throws NullPointerException if both arguments are null. A broken Map implementation in user code may still throw at runtime.

Examples


 if (MapSupport.isEmpty(settings)) {
     return Defaults.CONFIG;
 }

 int port = MapSupport.getInt(settings, "port", 8080);
 boolean ssl = MapSupport.getBoolean(settings, "ssl");
 String name = MapSupport.getString(settings, "name", "anonymous");

Nullability annotations (Nullable, NonNull) document contracts on signatures; defaultIfNull(Map, Map) follows ObjectSupport.requireNonNullElse(Object, Object) (both maps null yields NullPointerException).

Numeric constraints (NonNegative, Positive) document ranges where applicable in related APIs; map accessors here use defaults rather than validating numeric ranges on keys.

関連項目:
  • Map.isEmpty()
  • Map.containsKey(Object)
  • CollectionSupport

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static <T extends Map<?, ?>>
    T
    defaultIfNull(T map, T defaultMap)
    Returns map when it is non-null; otherwise returns defaultMap.
    static boolean
    getBoolean(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key)
    Returns the boolean value mapped to key, or false when the map is null, the key is absent, the stored value is null, or a non-boolean value does not parse as true per Boolean.parseBoolean(String).
    static boolean
    getBoolean(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key, boolean defaultValue)
    Returns the boolean value mapped to key, or defaultValue when the map is null, the key is absent, or the stored value is null.
    static int
    getInt(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key)
    Returns the int mapped to key, or 0 when the map is null, the key is absent, the value is null, or parsing fails.
    static int
    getInt(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key, int defaultValue)
    Returns the int mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null, the key is absent, or the value cannot be parsed as an int.
    static long
    getLong(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key)
    Returns the long mapped to key, or 0L when the map is null, the key is absent, the value is null, or parsing fails.
    static long
    getLong(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key, long defaultValue)
    Returns the long mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null, the key is absent, or the value cannot be parsed as a long.
    static @Nullable String
    getString(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key)
    Returns the string form of the value mapped to key, or null when map is null, the key is absent, or the stored value is null (via ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) with a null default).
    static @Nullable String
    getString(@Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable Object key, @Nullable String defaultValue)
    Returns the string form of the value mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null or the key is absent.
    static boolean
    isEmpty(@Nullable Map<?,?> map)
    Returns true if map is null or Map.isEmpty().
    static boolean
    isNotEmpty(@Nullable Map<?,?> map)
    Negation of isEmpty(Map): true when map is non-null and has at least one entry.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • メソッドの詳細

    • isEmpty

      public static boolean isEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map)
      Returns true if map is null or Map.isEmpty().
      パラメータ:
      map - map to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if map is null or has no entries
      関連項目:
      • isNotEmpty(Map)
      • CollectionSupport.isEmpty(java.util.Collection)

    • isNotEmpty

      public static boolean isNotEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map)
      Negation of isEmpty(Map): true when map is non-null and has at least one entry.
      パラメータ:
      map - map to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if map is not null and not empty
      関連項目:
      • isEmpty(Map)

    • defaultIfNull

      @NonNull public static <T extends Map<?, ?>> T defaultIfNull(@Nullable T map, @Nullable T defaultMap)
      Returns map when it is non-null; otherwise returns defaultMap. Equivalent to ObjectSupport.requireNonNullElse(Object, Object).

      If both map and defaultMap are null, throws NullPointerException.

      型パラメータ:
      T - concrete map type
      パラメータ:
      map - primary map, may be null
      defaultMap - fallback when map is null; must be non-null if map may be null and callers need a non-null result
      戻り値:
      map if non-null, otherwise defaultMap
      関連項目:
      • ObjectSupport.requireNonNullElse(Object, Object)

    • getString

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String getString(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key)
      Returns the string form of the value mapped to key, or null when map is null, the key is absent, or the stored value is null (via ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) with a null default).
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to stringify, may be null if the map allows it
      戻り値:
      string value, or null when falling back as described
      関連項目:
      • getString(Map, Object, String)

    • getString

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String getString(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key, @Nullable @Nullable String defaultValue)
      Returns the string form of the value mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null or the key is absent. When the key is present, returns ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) with defaultValue as the null default (so a stored null yields defaultValue).
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to stringify, may be null if the map allows it
      defaultValue - value when the map is null, the key is missing, or the value stringifies to null
      戻り値:
      string value or defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • getString(Map, Object)

    • getInt

      public static int getInt(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key)
      Returns the int mapped to key, or 0 when the map is null, the key is absent, the value is null, or parsing fails.
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to interpret
      戻り値:
      parsed int, or 0 when falling back
      関連項目:
      • getInt(Map, Object, int)

    • getInt

      public static int getInt(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key, int defaultValue)
      Returns the int mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null, the key is absent, or the value cannot be parsed as an int. If the value is a Number, returns Number.intValue(); otherwise the value is converted with ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) and passed to NumberSupport.toInt(String, int).
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to interpret
      defaultValue - value when the map is null, the key is missing, the value is null, or parsing fails
      戻り値:
      parsed int or defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • getLong(Map, Object, long)

    • getLong

      public static long getLong(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key)
      Returns the long mapped to key, or 0L when the map is null, the key is absent, the value is null, or parsing fails.
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to interpret
      戻り値:
      parsed long, or 0L when falling back
      関連項目:
      • getLong(Map, Object, long)

    • getLong

      public static long getLong(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key, long defaultValue)
      Returns the long mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null, the key is absent, or the value cannot be parsed as a long. If the value is a Number, returns Number.longValue(); otherwise the value is converted with ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) and passed to NumberSupport.toLong(String, long).
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to interpret
      defaultValue - value when the map is null, the key is missing, the value is null, or parsing fails
      戻り値:
      parsed long or defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • getInt(Map, Object, int)

    • getBoolean

      public static boolean getBoolean(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key)
      Returns the boolean value mapped to key, or false when the map is null, the key is absent, the stored value is null, or a non-boolean value does not parse as true per Boolean.parseBoolean(String).
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to interpret
      戻り値:
      parsed boolean, or false when falling back
      関連項目:
      • getBoolean(Map, Object, boolean)

    • getBoolean

      public static boolean getBoolean(@Nullable @Nullable Map<?,?> map, @Nullable @Nullable Object key, boolean defaultValue)
      Returns the boolean value mapped to key, or defaultValue when the map is null, the key is absent, or the stored value is null. When the value is a Boolean, it is unboxed. For any other type, ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) is used with a null second argument; if that yields null, defaultValue is returned. Otherwise the result is Boolean.parseBoolean(String) on that string (same rule as the JDK: only "true", ignoring case, yields true). Alternate string conventions are not supported; read the value as a string (for example via getString(Map, Object, String)) and parse it with application-specific rules when needed.
      パラメータ:
      map - map to read from, may be null
      key - key whose value to interpret
      defaultValue - value when the key is missing, the map is null, the value is null, or string conversion yields null
      戻り値:
      interpreted boolean
